name: CANDAKA77 Airdrop is LIVE — Complete Tasks, Level Up & Earn CDK77!
description:
CANDAKA77 (CDK77) is a deflationary ERC-20 utility token built on Ethereum with a fixed supply of **77,000,000** tokens. No new tokens can ever be minted — supply only decreases over time through a **95% burn mechanism** on every exchange.

25% of the total supply (19,250,000 CDK77) is allocated to the community airdrop pool and distributed through a task-based leveling system.

## How It Works

Complete tasks to earn Experience Points (EXP). Accumulate 1,000 EXP to level up and claim CDK77 tokens for every level reached. Normal levels reward **100 CDK77**, while bonus levels (every 20th) reward **200 CDK77**. Reach max level 500 and earn up to **52,500 CDK77** per user.

## What Can You Do with CDK77?

- Trade freely on **Uniswap V2** (CDK77/WETH pair) — 24/7, no intermediary
- Exchange for platform credits at a fixed rate of **30 CDK77 = 1 Credit**
- Hold and benefit from increasing scarcity as supply decreases
- Transfer peer-to-peer to any Ethereum wallet

## Why CDK77 Has Value

Every platform credit exchange permanently burns **95%** of the tokens used. More users = more burns = less supply = more scarcity. CDK77 is not a speculative token — it is backed by real platform utility with a mathematically deflationary trajectory.

## Token Details

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Name** | CANDAKA77 (CDK77) |
| **Network** | Ethereum (ERC-20) |
| **Total Supply** | 77,000,000 (fixed, non-mintable) |
| **Airdrop Pool** | 19,250,000 CDK77 (25%) |
| **Contracts** | Open-source & verified |

## Rules

- One wallet per user (permanent binding)
- Bot accounts and duplicate entries will be disqualified
- All tasks are verified via API, server-side checks, or manual review
- Rewards are distributed through smart contract with signature verification

## Links

- **Website:** [premium.candaka77.com](https://premium.candaka77.com/)
- **Airdrop:** [premium.candaka77.com/page/airdrop](https://premium.candaka77.com/page/airdrop)
- **Whitepaper & Roadmap:** [premium.candaka77.com/page/whitepaper](https://premium.candaka77.com/page/whitepaper)

---

*Join the CANDAKA77 ecosystem early. Complete tasks, climb the leaderboard, and earn CDK77 before the airdrop pool runs out!*
 the airdrop pool runs out!

name: 📖 ReadAide Explorer: Create Your Account & Start Your Reading Journey
description:
🚀 Welcome to the ReadAide Onboarding Quest!

![ReadAAde_CreateAccount.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/85776/974e13d2-c3a7-4a8f-b593-5dc4673f9063.png)

ReadAide is a phonics-powered platform designed to help users learn, improve, and master reading skills through interactive tools and guided lessons.

🎯 Your Mission: Create your free account on ReadAide and take the first step toward unlocking a smarter, more effective way to read.

📝 How to Complete This Quest:

1️⃣ Visit the official ReadAide platform 👉 https://readaide.com
2️⃣ Click on "Log " or "Get Started"
3️⃣ Enter your details (email, username, password) or login via gmail and complete the registration process
4️⃣ Log into your new ReadAide account and explore the dashboard
6️⃣ Return here and claim your reward! 🎁

🌟 Why ReadAide?

📚 Phonics-based learning tools to build strong reading foundations
🧠 AI-assisted features for personalized reading improvement
🌍 Accessible from anywhere — learn at your own pace
⚡ Clean, intuitive interface built for learners of all levels

⚠️ Quest Rules:

1. You must create a new, genuine account on ReadAide.com
2. Each wallet/user may only complete this quest once
3. Duplicate or bot accounts will be disqualified ❌


🔗 Useful Links:

🌐 Platform: https://readaide.com


💡 ReadAide is on a mission to make reading accessible, effective, and enjoyable for everyone. Join the community today and earn rewards while you learn!

🏆 Reward: Complete the quest to earn your 100 ReadAide Points!

name: Hack the Mint: Unlock Your Olympex Pass the Smart Way
description:
The Olympex Pass mint is now live.

Those who complete these social tasks and win may be eligible to receive it completely free as one of the two rewards.

Now here’s the smart trick.

You might see the $250 requirement and think you need $250 in capital.

You don’t.

You only need $250 in swap volume.

With as little as $10, you can swap between stablecoins like USDC and USDT multiple times until you reach the required volume.

No speculative tokens.
No risky exposure.
Just simple stablecoin swaps.

Sometimes it’s not about having more money.
It’s about knowing how to play smart.

Unlock your Pass, start building your position inside the ecosystem, and let your activity compound over time.
